title: ZIPCCI 1000 Pcs 1.1 inch Nickel Plated Mini Safety Pins
features: High Quality: Made of rust-resistant nickel plated steel, not be bent easily.
Package Includes: 1000 pieces 1.1-inch Mini safety pins.
Widely Used: These safety pins apply to for home, sewing pins, fashion, craft pins, marathon, first aid kit, diaper pins.
More Safety: These safety pins feature a safety clasp, protect you and family members who use them form the sharp point.
Note: This is a sharp product, Keep away from children.
description: ZIPCCI Safety Pins are great for basting quilts, as well as, sewing, quilting, jewelry making, craft projects and general household use. Specifications: Quantity: 1000 pieces Material: Nickel-plated Steel Size: 1.1 inches (28mm) Warm Tips: Keep away from children. This is a sharp product please be careful when using the safety pins.
